title: Second ship Jag Arnav also attacked in Hormuz; departed from Saudi Arabia's al-Jubail
snippet: The Jag Arnav, which departed from Saudi Arabia's al-Jubail port, was also fired upon by Iranian forces in the Strait of Hormuz. Together with the Sanmar Herald, at least two vessels were attacked.
tag_reason: New detail identifying second attacked ship (Jag Arnav) and its origin (Saudi al-Jubail) — updates Apr 18 ship attack reporting
